raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left side of box_1 is accessible and there is enough clearance for the left end-effector to brace against box_1 without contacting box_2 or the cup.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is laterally braced by the left end-effector, reducing the risk of box_1 shifting while the right arm establishes a secure grasp."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The front and left sides of box_1 are accessible; the right arm can approach the accessible front side of box_1 without colliding with the cup or box_2, and the left arm is stabilizing box_1 to prevent slip.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely grasped by the right end-effector and lifted slightly clear of the table surface, while remaining clear of box_2."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The left side of box_1 is accessible and there is enough clearance for the left end-effector to brace against box_1 without contacting box_2 or the cup.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is laterally braced by the left end-effector, reducing the risk of box_1 shifting while the right arm establishes a secure grasp.

parsed_json.Precondition: The front and left sides of box_1 are accessible; the right arm can approach the accessible front side of box_1 without colliding with the cup or box_2, and the left arm is stabilizing box_1 to prevent slip.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely grasped by the right end-effector and lifted slightly clear of the table surface, while remaining clear of box_2.
